what_was_requested: ETAP 3: cf_session_momentum branch — validate, publish, build, clone strategy, save version with session momentum bias, backtest, and record results
what_was_done: 1. Validated cf_session_momentum custom feature (session-weighted rolling return: US hours +1, Asian hours -1, European 0, rolling 288-bar mean). Fixed API from ctx['close'] to ctx.frame() with timestamp_utc extraction. 2. Published to feature registry successfully. 3. Feature dataset already contained cf_session_momentum (26 total columns). 4. Cloned baseline strategy 'active-signal-v1' into 'candidate_session_momentum'. 5. Saved version 2 with cf_session_momentum as directional bias: long when >0.001, short when <-0.001. 6. Ran full-history backtest (2021-03-24 to 2024-12-31). 7. Results: catastrophic degradation — only 4 trades (all short, all stop_loss), -$43.62 PnL, 0% win rate, PF=0.0 vs baseline $1308.65/498 trades/PF=1.29. 8. Recorded result in research memory with REJECT verdict. Root cause: threshold ±0.001 is far too strict, filtering out ~99% of signals.
